name: Suspicious Sysmon Driver Unload Detected
description: Detects attempts to unload the Sysmon driver (SysmonDrv) using `fltmc.exe`. Adversaries may do this to evade detection by disabling Sysmon.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'fltmc.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the fltmc.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute fltmc.exe, including 'unload' and 'SysmonDrv'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which fltmc.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
